neighborhoods.name: Lawrenceville / Strip District
neighborhoods.description: Revitalized east neighborhoods with craft breweries, galleries, and the famous Strip District market

housing.predominantType: Renovated row houses, lofts, and modern apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Pittsburgh. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Mount Lebanon
neighborhoods.description: Upscale southern suburb with excellent schools, walkable Uptown district, and T-line transit

housing.predominantType: Colonial houses, Cape Cods, and established homes

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Pittsburgh's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: McKeesport / Monroeville
neighborhoods.description: Eastern communities with very affordable housing, Mon Valley heritage, and improving transit
neighborhoods.character: Mon Valley, very affordable, improving transit

housing.predominantType: Older houses, row homes, and affordable apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Cranberry Township / Wexford
neighborhoods.description: Northern suburbs with excellent schools, Cranberry Township parks, and growing commercial

housing.predominantType: Newer single-family homes and planned communities

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
